narrative:
Precinct Shalersville C (precinct in Portage County) has 752 registered voters, with 64.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
